body:
📈 LONG SETUP — AZTECUSDT (Bitunix · 15m)
ID: AZTEC-L-20260709

Structure: after rejecting the 0.01500 highs twice, price pulled back into the 0.01325–0.01352 support shelf and is holding above the 0.01299 swing low. While this zone holds, the range structure favors a rotation back toward the highs — reclaiming and holding 0.0135 is the long trigger.

🔺 Bias: Long on the hold/bounce from support
🎯 Entry zone: 0.01325 – 0.01352 (support shelf)
🛑 Invalidation (SL): 0.01298 — below the swing low
🎯 Targets: TP1 0.01399 · TP2 0.01449 · TP3 0.01500 (range high)

Manage your own size — 15m idea: fast timeframe, keep risk tight and move your stop as it works. An idea to study, not a trade to copy blindly.

#Signal
